2025-05-27T17:39:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , the slow lane of Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Tin Ma Court is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) ends at Lung Cheung Road near Diamond Hill MTR Station. Traffic is congested now.
2025-05-27T17:39:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，龍翔道(往荃灣方向)近天馬苑的慢線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在龍翔道(往荃灣方向)的車龍龍尾已到龍翔道近鑽石山港鐵站。 現時上址交通擠塞。

2025-05-27T17:59:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain burst , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound) near Siu Hong MTR Station are still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Motorists heading from the urban areas to the vicinity of Yuen Long may consider using alternative routes, such as Tai Lam Tunnel.   Traffic queues on Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound) ends at Tuen Mun Road near Siu Lam and Lung Fu Road near Tuen Mun Golf Centre.   Citizens please take note KMB's & LWB's service travelling via Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound) have been affected. 
Please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services.   The following affected bus routes have been diverted:
LWB: A33, A33X, A36, A37, E36, E36A and E37
KMB: 60M, 60X, 61X, 62P, 62X, 259D, 259E, 259S, 259X, 260B, 263, 263A, 263B, 263C, 960B and B9
MTR Bus: K54
For the latest service arrangement of individual franchised bus routes, members of the public can refer to the information on the website or mobile application of the franchised bus operator(s).   Traffic is congested now.
2025-05-27T17:59:00.CONTENT_CN:
因水管爆裂，屯門公路(往元朗方向)近兆康港鐵站的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  由市區前往元朗一帶的駕駛人士可考慮改用其他道路，例如大欖隧道。  現時在屯門公路(往元朗方向)的車龍龍尾已到屯門公路近小欖及龍富路近屯門高爾夫球中心。  市民請留意九巴及龍運巴士途經屯門公路(往元朗方向)的服務會受影響。
請考慮使用其他公共交通服務，例如港鐵服務。  以下受影響巴士路線須改道行駛:
龍運巴士:A33、A33X、A36、A37、E36、E36A及E37
九巴:60M、60X、61X、62P、62X、259D、259E、259S、259X、260B、263、263A、263B、263C、960B及B9
港鐵巴士:K54
有關個別專營巴士路線的最新服務情況，市民可參閱專營巴士公司的網頁或流動應用程式內的資訊。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2025-05-27T18:19:00.CONTENT_EN:
Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound) near Siu Hong MTR Station which was closed due to watermain burst are re-opened to all traffic.   However, citizens please take note KMB's & LWB's service travelling via Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound) have been affected. Please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services.   The following affected bus routes are still diverted:
LWB: A33, A33X, A36, A37, E36, E36A and E37
KMB: 60M, 60X, 61X, 62P, 62X, 259D, 259E, 259S, 259X, 260B, 263, 263A, 263B, 263C, 960B and B9
MTR Bus: K54
For the latest service arrangement of individual franchised bus routes, members of the public can refer to the information on the website or mobile application of the franchised bus operators.   . Members of the public are advised to pay attention to radio / TV announcements on traffic conditions.
